intent.description: The core intent of the user request.

funder_agency.description: The target funding agency (e.g., NIH, ERC, MEXT SPReAD).

project_description.description: Free-text description of the grant proposal topic or specific instructions.

target_files.description: Specific files to regenerate or edit.

review_rounds.description: Number of mock peer review rounds to execute.

reference_materials.description: Paths to PDFs or URLs for funder guidelines or key literature.
